title: The Lookman Reimagined
description: Adds a creature that has many phases through your nights
body:
THE LOOKMAN
in this mod it adds a entity that has multiple phases that spawn through your world

this entitys spawns in your nights so dont stay out for to long because it might find you

 

INSTRUCTIONS:

 

Phase 1: dont get to close to it

 

find out the other phases by yourself good luck

 

THIS MOD HAS LOUD NOISES AND JUMPSCARES YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED

 

this is a trial and error mod 

 

have fun :)
